features.name: Keyword Discovery (Basic Testing)
features.description: Find, rank, and score keywords effectively
features.output: Keyword list, volume, difficulty, trend score, intent

features.name: Competitor Keyword Gap Analysis
features.description: Pull competitor data and compare sources
features.output: Missing keywords, traffic potential, competitor rank

features.name: Search Intent Classification
features.description: Identify intent behind keywords with reasoning
features.output: Intent labels + short reasoning

features.name: Topic Clustering / Semantic Grouping
features.output: Groups like 'Content Generation,' 'Ad Targeting,' etc.

features.name: Trend Forecasting / Seasonal Analysis
features.output: Trend graphs, growth %, seasonality insights

features.name: SERP & Snippet Opportunity Testing
features.description: Connect to SERP APIs and analyze opportunities
features.output: Snippet titles, PAA questions, top-ranking pages

features.name: Content Gap & Optimization Suggestions
features.output: Missing subtopics, suggested title tags, meta ideas

features.name: Conversion-Focused Keyword Mapping
features.output: Keywords ranked by CPC / buyer intent / ROI potential

features.name: Domain/Industry-Specific Tests
features.output: Keyword sets relevant to niche with actionable metrics

features.name: Advanced Combined Real-World Scenarios
features.output: Multi-layered keyword strategy with recommendations
